reviews.comment:
Bastante limpia , demora en la atención en la playa . De noche se convierte en el albergue de un vagabundo . Deberían cerrarla con rejas .

(Translated by Google)
Fairly clean, but beach service takes a while. At night, it becomes a homeless shelter. They should close it with bars.

reviews.comment:
Muy lenta la atención!! Los socios no tenemos beneficios en la atención! Comparado con cualquier YPF, tardan mínimo, el doble de tiempo!!

(Translated by Google)
The service is incredibly slow! Members don't get any special treatment! Compared to any YPF station, it takes at least twice as long!

Parking should be limited to members only.

reviews.comment:
Recien sali de la estacion , despues de 15’ esperando al playero que termine de hablar , le prengunte si habia pasado algo  porq no se iba el auto de adelante . me dice que ya me atiende y se va caminando lentamente para adentro …. Jaja no se si no tiene ganas de trabajar o que  pero no podes tardar tanto hermano .. o hace sociales en otro lado o al menos atende primero .. al final no cargue porque estaba muy ocupado en otra cosa el hombre jaja por suerte tengo otra mas cerca pero q forrrrrrrre

(Translated by Google)
I just left the station, after 15' waiting for the beach attendant to finish talking, I asked him if something had happened because the car in front of me wouldn't leave. He tells me that he'll serve me and slowly walks inside... Haha I don't know if he doesn't feel like working or what but you can't take so long bro... or he's socializing somewhere else or at least serve me first... in the end I didn't load because the man was too busy with something else haha ​​luckily I have another one closer but what a bummer
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9098900885435931533/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQzal9UdGtRRRAB
